first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are substantively identical. Both give the same score (2/10) and arrive at the same conclusion for the same reason: the candidate's background is in software engineering, while the role requires deep hardware and silicon-level expertise. The minor differences in wording and the specific examples chosen for strengths and concerns fall well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in the core assessment of the candidate's qualifications.
